mentions.note: 151-year-old hardware company thriving in data center liquid-cooling shift. 60% recurring repair/replacement business. Up ~55% past 12 months, ~20% YTD. Disciplined 22 acquisitions in 12 years (1+1=3 philosophy). Strong pricing discipline, energy/water/safety focus fit data center expansion. Cramer: stock chart beautiful; own it don't trade it. Pessimists dead wrong.

Own it don't trade it; 151-year-old industrial player riding data center liquid cooling boom; terrific quarter, strong full-year guidance; 60% repeat business (annuity), 22 acquisitions in 12 years; contractors busy 3 years out.
